most_positive.title: $NVDA God gave him life, wind, guts, muscle, long hair and the best thing he could ever hold under these circumstances His flag. Thank you God for allowing me the freedom to hold my NVDA shares today in Your free country that you gave me. I will always try to put my best foot forward when I deal with the money that you have blessed me with. I appreciate you stocktwits for having to read my thoughts in this market while Howard L. still hasn't thrown me off of the Nvidia stocktwit train. Hold your shares long like this kid below. It takes some spunk but you still got it kids!!! C'ya week before next ER.

$NVDA The business news has become downright slanderous when it comes to how it reports on this beautiful miracle company that is Nvidia. There isn't one negative I can think of and that terrifies them so they create fairy tales instead. You will never get me to sell one share with any of your drivel. I will always be free to type the truth about this company in this free country! Nvidia rocks!
